mapper.sql: id, phone, user_name, user_password, sex, mail, avatar, last_login_time, user_status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into user (id, phone, user_name, user_password, sex, mail, avatar, last_login_time, user_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userPassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user
id,
phone,
user_name,
user_password,
sex,
mail,
avatar,
last_login_time,
user_status,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userPassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_password = #{userPassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=CHAR},
mail = #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_status = #{userStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update user set phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_password = #{userPassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=CHAR}, mail = #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_status = #{userStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, phone, user_name, user_password, sex, mail, avatar, last_login_time, user_status, create_time, update_time from user where user_name=#{userName}
